===================
=== Kansas_ City_2002.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN
Kansas City 2002

Kansas City, Missouri
Uptown Theater
Monday, October 28, 2002

Crystal Cat Records 680-681

commercial bootleg>unclekurty's wallet>eac>wav>shn>(seekable)

Disc One
1  Intro  
2  To Be Alone With You (Bob on piano) 
3  In The Summertime (Bob on piano and Larry on mandolin) 
4  Tombstone Blues (Bob on piano) 
5  Accidentally Like A Martyr (song by Warren Zevon) (Bob on piano) 
6  I'll Be Your Baby Tonight (Bob on piano and Larry on pedal steel) 
7  Brown Sugar (song by Mick Jagger and Keith Richards) 
8  Girl Of The North Country (acoustic) 
9  It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic)
   (Bob on piano, Larry on cittern, Charlie on electric guitar and Tony on standup bass) 
10 The Times They Are A-Changin' (acoustic)
   (Bob on acoustic guitar, Larry on cittern, Charlie on electric guitar and Tony on standup bass)
   (Bob dedicated the song to Minnesota Senator Paul Wellstone) 
11 Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp) 
12 It's All Over Now, Baby Blue (acoustic) (Larry on pedal steel and Charlie on electric guitar) 

Disc Two
1  Old Man (acoustic) (Song by Neil Young)
   (Bob and Larry on acoustic guitars, Charlie on electric guitar and Tony on electric bass) 
2  Honest With Me (Bob on piano and Larry on slide guitar) 
3  Simple Twist Of Fate (Bob on acoustic guitar and Larry on pedal steel) 
4  High Water (For Charley Patton) (Bob on piano) 
5  Mutineer (Song by Warren Zevon) (Bob on piano and Larry on pedal steel) 
6  Bye And Bye (Bob on piano and Tony on standup bass) 
7  Summer Days (Tony on standup bass) 
   (encore) 
8  Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic) 
9  All Along The Watchtower

Bonus Tracks
10 Boom Boom Mancini (October 4, 2002)
11 Lawyers Guns And Money (October 5, 2002)
12 Friend Of The Devil (October 5, 2002)
13 Carrying A Torch (October 19, 2002)

shn conversion unclekurty@unclekurty.com
